overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character navigates neon-lit streets, crosses a marked intersection, and passes various futuristic storefronts while accompanied by a companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with neon commercial buildings and elevated highway

events.description: approaching the marked crosswalk and overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk holding a tablet device, accompanied by a companion with a backpack

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside ego, wearing a red backpack and light-colored clothing

illuminated advertisement screen displaying NC logo and text
tall futuristic skyscraper with multiple glowing neon signs and billboards
raised highway with vehicles passing underneath metal framework
row of buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open sidewalk at dusk, passing a distinctive twisted tree and digital billboard. Neon-lit commercial buildings line the right side while an elevated highway structure runs parallel on the left. The atmosphere is warm with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: marked pedestrian crosswalk under concrete overpass

events.description: steps onto the crosswalk with yellow stripes and green WALK markings
futuristic vehicle drives past on the right while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the marked crosswalk while looking at the tablet device

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving past the crosswalk intersection
companion crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass with cyan neon strip lighting underneath
yellow striped crosswalk with green glowing WALK text on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street under a massive overpass structure illuminated by cyan neon lights. The crosswalk features bright yellow and green markings. Vehicles pass by on the right as the character moves from the open sidewalk into the sheltered underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with fast food restaurant and neon benches

events.description: passing the WILD FUN digital billboard on the left
approaching and passing the Tasty Burger restaurant with large neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past various pedestrians and storefronts while checking the tablet

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red and white athletic outfit walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: vertical digital advertisement for WILD FUN ALL NIGHT with purple graphics
futuristic public bench with bright cyan neon lighting underneath
large neon sign for TASTY BURGER restaurant with red and green lettering

segments.scene_description: Walking under the overpass, the character passes a glowing digital billboard and neon-illuminated benches. The Tasty Burger restaurant dominates the right side with its bright neon signage. Other pedestrians walk in opposing directions along this covered commercial walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban corridor with vending machines and street vendors

events.description: passing bright purple vending machines and a street vendor stall on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrower street, passing various pedestrians and urban elements while the companion walks alongside

notable_agents.action: companion with blue hair walking alongside ego, looking at a device
pedestrian leaning against wall near the vending machines

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending machines with glowing screens and interface
wall covered with street art, posters, and urban decay textures
small vendor setup with glowing items on display table

segments.scene_description: The corridor narrows as the character walks past purple vending machines and graffiti-covered walls. The companion with blue hair walks alongside, both checking their devices. The environment feels more enclosed with buildings on both sides and various street vendors visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from an open city sidewalk into a sheltered, enclosed commercial walkway. It begins alongside an elevated highway at dusk, passing a twisted tree and digital billboards under a warm glow of mixed natural and artificial light. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions under a massive overpass illuminated by cyan neon, crossing a street marked with bright yellow and green lines. The environment then opens into a covered pedestrian area dominated by the glowing signage of a Tasty Burger restaurant and neon-lit benches before narrowing into a tighter corridor. Finally, the camera follows the character and their blue-haired companion past purple vending machines and graffiti-covered walls, moving deeper into the dense, enclosed architecture of the city.
